curation_notes: The patch commit c20cfa8 (PR #151) adds an 'else { return; }' branch in the grow method of lib.rs to prevent deallocation when the requested capacity equals the current capacity of a spilled SmallVec. The vulnerability location was derived directly from the patch diff, which modifies only lib.rs in the grow function. The advisory description explicitly names the grow method and describes the double-free behavior. Only 1 non-test source file was changed with a 2-line fix.
